title: FastGhast
description: Mod that modifies the speed of the Happy Ghast
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/dacl) Simple mod that let's you fully control the speed of the Happy Ghast when mounted by a player. In the config you can set the speed of the Happy Ghast, which is 0.15 by default (3x the 0.05 vanilla speed). --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
